rows: Ensure that the API provides detailed tracking of all customer acquisition sources.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of identifying customer acquisition sources, specifically where bookings come from. However, the evidence provided only mentions 'Top referrer: Instagram (28% of new customers)' without detailing how this data is captured or if it is comprehensive enough to cover all sources. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to fully satisfy the requirement of tracking customer acquisition sources as specified in the use case needs.
gaps: Insufficient detail on how customer acquisition sources are tracked and reported.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define customer acquisition source tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the API provides detailed tracking of all customer acquisition sources.
